hero.headline: Stop losing revenue to failed subscription payments
hero.subheadline: SubGuard automatically detects, retries, and recovers failed billing attempts — so you keep your subscribers without lifting a finger.

socialProof.compatible: Compatible with the leading subscription apps

problem.headline: Every month, payments fail silently
problem.pain1Desc: Most merchants don't know a payment failed until the customer cancels.
problem.pain2Desc: Industry average: 6-9% of subscriptions fail due to payment issues each month.
problem.stat: $600B lost annually to failed payments globally

howItWorks.headline: Set up in 5 minutes. Recover revenue forever.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Install SubGuard from the Shopify App Store. No configuration needed — it automatically connects to your subscription app (Appstle, ReCharge, Seal, or Bold).
howItWorks.step2Desc: When a subscription payment fails, SubGuard detects it in under 60 seconds via Shopify webhooks and immediately queues a smart retry sequence.
howItWorks.step3Desc: SubGuard retries the payment at intelligent intervals (Day 1, 3, 7, 14). Sends recovery emails to customers. You only pay when we recover revenue.

features.headline: Everything you need to stop churn
features.feat1Desc: Detects failed payments in under 60 seconds via Shopify webhooks. No polling, no delays.
features.feat2Desc: Configurable retry intervals with exponential backoff. Default: Day 1, 3, 7, 14. Adjust to your needs.
features.feat3Desc: Automated, branded emails sent to customers when payment fails and when it recovers.
features.feat4Desc: See all failed payments, retry status, recovery rate, and revenue saved — updated live in your Shopify Admin.

pricing.headline: Free to install. Pay only when you recover.
pricing.explanation: You pay nothing until SubGuard recovers a failed payment. Our success is aligned with yours.
pricing.feature5: Compatible with Appstle, ReCharge, Seal & Bold
pricing.example: Example: If SubGuard recovers $10,000/month in failed payments, you pay $300. The other $9,700 is yours.

faq.headline: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Does SubGuard work with my subscription app?
faq.a1: Yes. SubGuard is compatible with Appstle, ReCharge, Seal Subscriptions, and Bold Subscriptions — the four most popular subscription apps on Shopify.
faq.a2: You only pay when SubGuard successfully recovers a failed payment. If a payment of $100 is recovered, SubGuard's fee is $3. If nothing is recovered, you pay nothing.
faq.q3: How quickly does SubGuard detect failed payments?
faq.a3: SubGuard detects failed payments in under 60 seconds via Shopify's native webhooks — no polling or manual checks required.
faq.q4: Will customers know SubGuard sent the email?
faq.a4: Emails are sent from your verified domain and branded with your store name. Customers see it as part of your normal communication.
faq.a5: Yes. SubGuard only accesses the data required to process payment retries. We never store full card numbers and comply with Shopify's security requirements.
faq.a6: After the final retry (Day 14 by default), the failure is marked as unrecoverable and you're notified. You can configure the number of retries in Settings.

finalCta.headline: Start recovering lost revenue today
finalCta.subheadline: Free to install. No risk. No setup complexity.
